breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's headline sigma jumped 29% in 10 days — mechanical prediction accurate to 1.4%
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's Fisher-combined significance rose from 47.69σ to 61.46σ between 2026-04-18 and 2026-04-28. The mechanical prediction (Fisher √n scaling) predicted 62.30σ; the observed 61.46σ is within 1.4%. The σ count keeps growing without any new physics — more stations means more shared-constant re-tests, not more independent evidence.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Concrete quantitative demonstration that the dome's headline evidence-number is mechanically predictable from sample size alone. Updated §4.1 now documents this vindication note.
